subcodes.first_line: At the outset, cast aside that which the people possess and take what hath come from the presence of God, the Lord of all worlds. By God, this is a Day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی اول القول ضع ما عند الناس و خذ ما اتی من لدی الله رب العالمین تالله هذا یوم فیه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
